DimensionType.description: Represents the data type of a dimension

description: Represents a dimension in the semantic layer

description.description: Human-readable description of what this dimension represents

expr.description: SQL expression that defines how to calculate this dimension

name.description: Unique identifier for the dimension within the view

original_expr.description: Original expression before variable encoding (if variables were used)

samples.description: Example values to help users understand the dimension content

synonyms.description: Alternative names or terms that refer to this dimension

title: Dimension
